calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272489 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73272489 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files | rg '(^|/)(record|snapshots?)/|73272489|questions-presented\\.txt$|documents\\.json$' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"for name in COURT_ID DOCKET_ID EVENT_ID PREDICTOR_ID RUN_ID MODEL_ID DECIDED_BEFORE RUNNER_TEMP; do value=\"${!name-}\"; printf '%s=%s\\n' \"$name\" \"$value\"; done\nfind /tmp \"${RUNNER_TEMP:-/home/runner/work/_temp}\" -maxdepth 6 -type f \\( -name context.json -o -name documents.json -o -name snapshot.json -o -name snapshot.yaml -o -name questions-presented.txt -o -name petition.txt -o -name brief-in-opposition.txt \\) 2>/dev/null | sort","workdir":"/h

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find . -path ./.git -prune -o -type f \\( -name context.json -o -name documents.json -o -name snapshot.json -o -name snapshot.yaml -o -name questions-presented.txt -o -name petition.txt -o -name brief-in-opposition.txt \\) -print | sort\nfind . -path ./.git -prune -o -type d -name record -print","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73272489/record -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort\nsed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/context.json
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json
sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/documents.json
sed -

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,700p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^#{1,6} |Modern discretionary-cert|relist|CVSG|salience|fee|paid|California|ca9' metrics/statpack.md | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '45,165p' metrics/statpack.md\nrg -n -i 'salience band|big case|selected|high|medium|low' metrics/statpack.md | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\" or .Term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const results = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition granted --limit 5","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}),
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition denied --limit 5","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_outpu
{"cell_id": "15", "max_tokens": 24000, "yield_time_ms": 20000}
const ms = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(ms);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"state law\" \"due process\" evidentiary ruling civil trial",order_by:"score desc",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","snippet","status"],num_results:5}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image" ? image(c) : c.type==="text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"Federal Rules of Evidence\" \"state court\"",order_by:"score desc",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url"],num_results:5}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image" ? image(c) : c.type==="text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\nmkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)
